headline: What happens in the next 15 business days.
subheadline: No mystery. No 47-step application. Here's the whole thing.

steps.title: You finish the 4 questions
steps.body: Your file is routed to a cash-out specialist with everything we need to price it.

steps.title: You get a text with your specialist's info
steps.body: Name and direct number of the cash-out specialist assigned to your deal.

steps.title: Your specialist calls you within 2 business hours
steps.body: To confirm your real numbers. No robocalls, no Calendly gauntlet, no call center.

steps.title: If you move forward, you close in ~15 business days
steps.body: And the wire hits your account.
